component.name: GifThatForYou
component.summary: Record your screen as an animated GIF

description.p: GifThatForYou is a GTK4 screen recording utility that saves recordings directly as high-quality animated GIFs. It works on any Wayland compositor via the XDG Desktop Portal ScreenCast API.

ul.li: Record the entire screen, a specific window, or a selected region
Automatic black-border removal for window recordings
Floyd-Steinberg dithering for high-quality GIF output
Stop recording with a floating indicator or Ctrl+Shift+R
